title: Release window reaffirmed
summary: Rockstar's parent company reiterates the planned launch window, with all signs pointing to a polished, on-time release.

title: Second trailer breaks records
summary: The follow-up trailer expands on the world and characters, dominating social feeds within hours of going live.

title: Next-gen systems detailed
summary: New details emerge on the simulation systems powering crowds, traffic and weather across the state of Leonida.

title: Vice City returns
summary: The first official trailer confirms a return to Vice City and introduces dual protagonists Lucia and Jason.
